top_findings.title: Clippy: to_string applied to Display type in writeln! args
top_findings.evidence: src/main.rs:30 — error: `to_string` applied to a type that implements `Display` in `writeln!` args (clippy::to-string-in-format-args)
top_findings.suggestion: Remove .to_string() — writeln! macro implements Display natively. Change line 30 to: writeln!(out, "{}", resp)?
